description_long: This armchair features a bold black and white vertical striped upholstery that covers its entire surface, giving it a striking and modern appearance. The chair has a high, winged backrest that curves gently outward, providing both visual interest and additional support. Its armrests are wide, padded, and smoothly integrated into the overall form, creating a cozy and enveloping seat. The seat area is deep and plush, suggesting comfort, though no distinct or removable cushions are visible. The base of the chair is low and rounded, with no visible legs, making the chair appear grounded and stable. The overall design is contemporary and eye-catching, suitable for urban parks, sidewalk lounges, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A modern armchair with bold black and white vertical stripes, high winged backrest, and wide padded armrests, featuring a low, legless base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep seat, wide padded armrests, and the high, winged backrest with prominent vertical stripes.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the outward curve of the backrest and the thick, continuous padding of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, winged backrest and the seamless striped upholstery wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Angled view reveals the integration of the armrest with the seat and the boldness of the striped pattern.
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, smoothly curved, fully upholstered
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs, low rounded base
